layout_note: Typed attachment table in transposed spreadsheet layout: each COLUMN is one transaction; field labels run down the left (EIF, SP/DC/JT, Security Name, Ticker, Transaction, Amount of Transaction A: None through L: Over $50,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000, Type of Transaction Purchase/Sale/Partial Sale/Exchange, Capital Gain Exceeded $200, Transaction Date). Selected cells are solid-black filled. The 'Transaction' label row is solid black across all 8 columns (formatting/divider, not data). The amount bucket 'C: $1,001-$15,000' is a continuous black band across columns 1-6; column 7 has D and column 8 has E filled instead. EIF row blank for all columns. Footer sheet label: 'MS MR Trust Partnership'. 8 transaction columns, all owner SP, transcribed left to right as rows below. Column 8's Security Name cell wraps over four printed lines: 'Tesla Inc. (Received in a distribution from an EIF' (closing parenthesis not printed).

rows.asset_name: Tesla Inc. (Received in a distribution from an EIF (TSLA)
